entries.speaker: caden
lines: I felt it through the water. The old channels are open

entries.speaker: caden
lines: She's free. Weakened, but free. The binding I'll place
will protect her while she heals.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: You came all the way from the Duskfen?

entries.speaker: caden
lines: The spirits carried me. They remember the paths even

entries.speaker: narrator
lines: Caden kneels beside the shrine and traces a pattern in
the water. Light follows his fingertips.

entries.speaker: caden
lines: It's done. Take this -- the Fenmother's Blessing. Her
domain is yours to pass through freely.

entries.speaker: caden
lines: Don't thank me. Thank her. She chose to trust you.
